creator: nisihara@mars.dti.ne.jp
text:
ac command with -d option.

Fix: 

fix to show_today() function in ac.c.
How-To-Repeat: A user for output was
1.overdays logon
2.no logon 1's next day
3.few days after logon

ex.
2001/3/1 2300-0200
2001/3/5 1300-1500 

$ac -d
Mar  4  total    3.00    #<here
Mar  5  total    2.00
